class.name: TopoShape
class.description: [TopoShape] wraps a [code]TopoDS_Shape[/code] and exposes measurements, bounds, copying, and core boolean operations. It is the first reusable topology abstraction for the extension.

method.name: is_null
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the wrapper does not currently hold a shape.

method.name: copy
method.description: Returns a copied shape.

method.name: fuse
method.description: Returns the union of this shape and [param other].

method.name: cut
method.description: Returns this shape with [param other] subtracted from it.

method.name: common
method.description: Returns the intersection between this shape and [param other].

method.name: fuse_all
method.description: Fuses this shape with every non-null [TopoShape] in [param shapes] from left to right. Returns a copy of this shape when [param shapes] is empty.

method.name: cut_all
method.description: Cuts every non-null [TopoShape] in [param shapes] from this shape from left to right. Returns a copy of this shape when [param shapes] is empty.

method.name: common_all
method.description: Computes the intersection of this shape with every non-null [TopoShape] in [param shapes] from left to right. Returns a copy of this shape when [param shapes] is empty.

method.name: translated
method.description: Returns a translated copy of the shape.

method.name: rotated
method.description: Returns a rotated copy of the shape around the specified axis.

method.name: scaled
method.description: Returns a scaled copy of the shape around the specified center.

method.name: mirrored_about_point
method.description: Returns a copy of the shape mirrored through the specified point.

method.name: mirrored_about_axis
method.description: Returns a copy of the shape mirrored around the specified [Axis].

method.name: mirrored_about_plane
method.description: Returns a copy of the shape mirrored across the specified [CadPlane].

method.name: located
method.description: Returns a transformed copy of the shape using the provided [Location].

method.name: get_volume
method.description: Returns the OCCT volume of the shape.

method.name: get_surface_area
method.description: Returns the OCCT surface area of the shape.

method.name: get_shape_type_name
method.description: Returns the OCCT topological kind as an uppercase name such as [code]FACE[/code], [code]EDGE[/code], or [code]SOLID[/code].

method.name: get_geom_type_name
method.description: Returns the OCCT geometric subtype name for edges and faces, such as [code]LINE[/code], [code]CIRCLE[/code], or [code]PLANE[/code]. Shapes without a geometric subtype return [code]OTHER[/code].

method.name: get_center_of_mass
method.description: Returns the shape center of mass computed from volume properties.

method.name: get_bounding_box_min
method.description: Returns the minimum point of the axis-aligned bounding box.

method.name: get_bounding_box_max
method.description: Returns the maximum point of the axis-aligned bounding box.

method.name: get_bounding_box_size
method.description: Returns the size of the axis-aligned bounding box.

method.name: get_vertices
method.description: Returns unique topological vertices as [Vertex] wrappers.

method.name: get_edges
method.description: Returns unique topological edges as [Edge] wrappers.

method.name: get_wires
method.description: Returns unique topological wires as [Wire] wrappers.

method.name: get_faces
method.description: Returns unique topological faces as [Face] wrappers.

method.name: get_shells
method.description: Returns unique topological shells as [Shell] wrappers.

method.name: get_compounds
method.description: Returns unique topological compounds as [Compound] wrappers.

method.name: get_solids
method.description: Returns unique topological solids as [Solid] wrappers.

method.name: decompose_compound
method.description: Decomposes a COMPOUND shape into an array of its direct child [TopoShape]s. If the shape is not a COMPOUND, returns an empty array. Useful for extracting individual parts from a STEP assembly imported via [method import_step_file].

method.name: get_vertex_positions
method.description: Returns the positions of all topological vertices contained by the shape.

method.name: get_edge_polylines
method.description: Returns one sampled 3D polyline per topological edge. Smaller [param deflection] values produce denser samples.

method.name: import_step_file
method.description: Loads a STEP file into this wrapper.

method.name: export_step_file
method.description: Writes this shape to a STEP file.

method.name: import_step_bytes
method.description: Loads a STEP model from an in-memory byte buffer.

method.name: export_step_bytes
method.description: Serializes this shape to STEP bytes.

method.name: import_stl_file
method.description: Loads an STL file into this wrapper.

method.name: export_stl_file
method.description: Writes this shape to an STL file. Set [param ascii] to [code]true[/code] for ASCII STL output.

method.name: import_stl_bytes
method.description: Loads an STL model from an in-memory byte buffer.

method.name: export_stl_bytes
method.description: Serializes this shape to STL bytes. Binary STL is used unless [param ascii] is [code]true[/code].

method.name: to_array_mesh
method.description: Triangulates the shape and returns it as a Godot [ArrayMesh].
